greeting: 👋 Hello! I'm Subhalaxmi Jena's AI Assistant. I can answer questions about her skills, projects, internships, education, certifications, achievements, and career. Try asking me something!
fallback: I'm sorry, I don't have information about that yet. You can ask me about skills, Java, Spring Boot, MERN Stack, AI, projects, internships, certifications, education, resume, or contact details.

responses.about: 👩‍💻 I'm Subhalaxmi Jena, a Computer Science Engineering student and Java Full Stack Developer from Bhubaneswar, India. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, MERN Stack, REST APIs, MySQL, MongoDB, and Artificial Intelligence. I'm passionate about building scalable applications and solving real-world problems.
